name: medchem
tagline: Documents the medchem Python library: drug-likeness rules, structural alert catalogs, complexity metrics, and a query language for compound
verdict: Clean, purely informational reference skill for the medchem cheminformatics library. No network egress, no shell piping of remote code, no secret handling, no hidden or manipulative instructions. Minor polish gaps only: no explicit negative-use guidance and no failure-path notes (invalid SMILES, missing optional binaries). Safe to install.

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' guidance (e.g., for non-drug-discovery cheminformatics tasks or when target-specific SAR knowledge is required instead) — a user could misapply the filters as a sole gate
No guidance on failure paths — e.g., invalid SMILES/molecule parsing errors, or behavior when the optional lilly-medchem-rules binary is missing beyond noting it's 'optional'.
